summary: A silver hatchback is stopped behind a yellow bus on a residential street. Suddenly, a white hatchback crashes into the silver hatchback from the left side.

events_timeline.event: A white hatchback crashes into the silver hatchback from the left side.

uncertainties: The identity of the white hatchback crashing into the silver hatchback is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There is a sudden crash between two vehicles, indicating a collision.
